UserConfig.title: User Configuration
UserConfig.description: Stores user-specific settings like Webhook URL and Gmail connection status.

userId.description: The unique ID of the user.

webhookUrl.description: The URL to send webhook notifications to.

secretKey.description: A secret key used to sign webhook payloads.

gmailConnected.description: Whether the user has connected their Gmail account.

TransactionLog.title: Transaction Log
TransactionLog.description: Records of processed transactions and webhook delivery status.

/logs/{logId}.description: Historical logs of all processed transactions.
